text.title: TikTok Basics for B2B/SaaS Worked Example
text.summary: One end-to-end worked example of TikTok Basics for B2B/SaaS producing a valid tiktok-foundation artefact, anonymised for portability.

step.name: trigger
step.text: Operator pulled the TikTok Basics for B2B/SaaS methodology to address a recurring task. Applies-If held: precondition checks passed; named owner available; inputs reachable.

step.name: apply-rules
step.text: Walked the rule set against the inputs; rules r1-three-to-five-pillars, r2-profile-bio-conversion-line, r3-three-formats-shipped-per-month passed; rule r4-ramp-plan-with-cadence required a small repair before the draft proceeded.

step.name: produce
step.text: Filled the template with the named owner, the input citations, and the per-finding decision; the artefact carried version 1.0.0.

step.name: validate
step.text: Ran scripts/validate-growth-tiktok-basics.py --file <path>; validator returned 0; the artefact shipped to the downstream consumer.

text.example: Applies-If held → inputs reachable → rules walked → artefact filled → validator returned 0 → owner signed off → downstream consumer registered.
